overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from a sci-fi horror game. The player character, wearing a protective suit and helmet, interacts with a level selection terminal in a dark industrial facility, then proceeds through metal mesh corridors with shifting colored lighting (green to red to blue) and ascends stairs to an upper level. The atmosphere is tense and claustrophobic with dramatic artificial lighting.

agents.ego_description: standing before the level selection terminal interface, contemplating the available level options A0, A1, and B1 displayed on the screen

entered.detail: illuminated interface displaying level options A0, A1, and B1 with a red selection bar and striped warning pattern
wire mesh safety barrier with grid pattern enclosing the terminal area
wire mesh safety barrier with grid pattern enclosing the terminal area
dim green lighting emanating from behind the mesh panels, creating an eerie glow

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark, enclosed industrial room dominated by a level selection terminal displaying options A0, A1, and B1. Green ambient light filters through metal mesh partitions on either side, creating a claustrophobic and tense atmosphere. The camera remains stationary, focused on the terminal interface.

events.description: emergency red lighting activates throughout the corridor, dramatically shifting the atmosphere from green to intense red
character turns away from terminal and begins walking forward through the metal corridor

agents.ego_description: turning away from the terminal and walking through the narrow metal mesh corridor toward the stairwell, heavy footsteps audible on the metal grating

entered.detail: enclosed walkway with metal grid walls on both sides creating a cage-like tunnel effect
intense red alarm lights casting dramatic shadows and creating an alert atmosphere
metal staircase with grated steps leading upward to the next level

segments.scene_description: The lighting shifts dramatically to emergency red as the character turns and walks away from the terminal. The camera follows through a narrow metal mesh corridor that feels like a cage, with red lights casting harsh shadows. The character approaches a metal stairwell at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level catwalk with blue ambient lighting

events.description: lighting shifts from red emergency to cool blue as character ascends to the upper level
character begins ascending the metal staircase to the upper catwalk

agents.ego_description: climbing the metal stairs and proceeding along the upper catwalk toward an exit door, the helmet reflecting the blue ambient light

entered.detail: elevated metal walkway with grated flooring and safety railings overlooking the lower level
cyan blue fluorescent lighting strips running along the corridor walls
metal security door with reinforced mesh window at the end of the upper corridor

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the metal stairs as the lighting transitions to a cool blue tone. The camera follows onto an upper catwalk with cyan fluorescent tubes illuminating the grated walkway. The character proceeds toward a metal exit door at the corridor's end, the industrial facility's oppressive atmosphere maintained by the mesh walls and artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial facility as the lighting shifts through a series of stark, atmospheric colors. It begins stationary in a dark room focused on a level selection terminal under a dim green glow filtering through metal mesh partitions. As the character turns and walks away, the environment transforms into a narrow, cage-like corridor bathed in emergency red light that casts harsh shadows. The scene then shifts to a cool blue tone as the camera follows the character ascending a metal stairwell and onto an upper catwalk illuminated by cyan fluorescent tubes. Finally, the movement proceeds along the grated walkway toward a metal exit door, maintaining the oppressive feeling of the mesh-walled facility.
